title: FUND II & SYSTEM ACCREDITATIONS
desc: Closed a additional $150M vehicle. Completed 42 investments world-wide. Facilitated 14 bilateral utility contracts with European energy bureaus.

title: REGULATORY CLEARANCE SPECIALIZATION
desc: Formed an in-house advisory board to assist pre-revenue companies through ITAR, dual-use exports, and national security audits.

title: LAUNCH OF SOVEREIGN FUND I
desc: Closed a initial $100M vehicle targeting Seed-stage aerospace payload transmitters, quantum algorithms, and custom optical interconnector fabrication.

title: FOUNDATION IN STEALTH
desc: Formed as an elite engineering research group in Munich evaluating cryptographic dual-use infrastructure and sub-component dependencies.
